# Voloma

Voloma is a Russian brand that makes wooden planters from Karelian pine for homes, terraces, balconies, and gardens.

Canonical site: https://xn--80adbi6agmb2c.xn--p1ai
Human-readable domain: https://воломавуд.рф
Language: ru-RU
Location: Petrozavodsk, Republic of Karelia, Russia

## Important Pages

- Home: https://xn--80adbi6agmb2c.xn--p1ai/
- Planter configurator: https://xn--80adbi6agmb2c.xn--p1ai/configurator
- Sitemap: https://xn--80adbi6agmb2c.xn--p1ai/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://xn--80adbi6agmb2c.xn--p1ai/robots.txt

## Products

Voloma makes wooden interior and outdoor planters in several formats:

- Узкое S
- Узкое M
- Узкое L
- Квадратное
- Прямоугольное

Core product attributes:

- Material: Karelian pine
- Finishes: natural, oak stain, rosewood stain
- Wood quality levels: standard and premium
- Delivery: disassembled flat-pack delivery across Russia
- Production time: usually 1 to 3 days

## Contact

- Phone: +7 8142 27-27-00
- Email: hello@voloma.ru
